headline: A Look At Fortinet (FTNT) Valuation As Growth Cools From Its Longer Term Shareholder Returns
summary: Fortinet stock at a glance Fortinet (FTNT) stock has been drawing attention after recent returns, including a 1-month move of 4.6% and a past 3-month gain of 8.8%, prompting closer scrutiny of its cybersecurity-focused business. See our latest analysis for Fortinet. The recent 1-day share price return of 2.35% and 7-day share price return of 0.72% sit alongside a 30-day share price return of 4.56% and year to date share price return of 10.80%. The 1-year total shareholder return of 20.61%...
